top.head:
Support and Resistance Levels:
A trader’s best friend
top.text-massive: Support and Resistance levels are an invaluable tool for a trader of any level. Learn to apply it correctly using our tips:

double.head: Double Up!
double.main-text: To protect yourself from false signals think of support and resistance as areas rather than lines. Get a better idea about the price behaviour by putting up several S&R lines at the same time - for levels of major and minor support and resistance.

sharp.head: Sharp = Long
sharp.main-text: The strength with which the price breaks either of the levels determines how long a trend will last. The sharper the movement - the stronger the trend.

reversal.head: Mind the Reversal
reversal.main-text: Don’t forget about the Support and Resistance Reversal. When the price goes below the support level, that level now becomes resistance. If the price passes the resistance level - you get a new support level.

cta.cta: We hope this information will help take your trading to the next level. Keep checking your mailbox for more tutorials from IQ Option!
